column1: # Seed entries. Igbo is a tonal language; tone diacritics (˥ high, ˩ low, or the
# combining acute/grave) matter and should be kept. espeak-ng usually has no
# native Igbo voice, so these entries drive the Tier-2 approximate rendering and
# the SSML <phoneme> output. Expand in bulk with bootstrap_ipa.py.
# Greetings / courtesy (from the original igbo-ssml phrases.txt)
